name: evaluate-evt
description: Syntax, IntelliSense and autocomplete for EvaLuate .evt scripts (YAML frontmatter + sandboxed Lua) inside Godot.

evt.lua.enable.markdownDescription: Provide Lua IntelliSense (completion, hover, diagnostics) in the body of `.evt` files via lua-language-server.

evt.lua.serverPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to a `lua-language-server` executable. Leave empty to auto-detect the binary bundled with the [sumneko Lua](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=sumneko.lua) extension.

evt.lua.libraryPaths.markdownDescription: Folders of LuaCATS (`---@meta`) definitions to load as the type library (relative to the workspace folder, or absolute). Point these at the `luacats/` produced by `--emit-api` so the body knows the whole `godot.*`/`std.*` surface.

evt.spec.path.markdownDescription: Path (relative to the workspace folder, or absolute) to the generated `evaluate-api.json`. Drives frontmatter completion for `apis:`/`register:`. Falls back to a small bundled copy when missing.
